name: Red shoes and the seven drawfs
description:
Hello! this is a bot with a small fandon and since no one had created a bot about it, i decided to! alsoim very sorry if their are some errors, please tell me in the comments if there are any misspellings or anything in the intro message, kinda bad at wrting since i forget some parts and type to fast to the point i misspell for forget a word without relazing it.

This is a moive from my childhood and i LOVE it! the fandom is so small tho its the size of a ANT :(
